extortion.description: CESO is a comprehensive firm offering multi-disciplinary capabilities through our ability to provide surveying, landscape architecture, civil engineering, environmental, architecture, and interior services to our clients.We will upload corporate documents soon. Very detailed personal employees information (passport scans, SSN lists, driver licenses,phones, emails, addresses, medical cards and so on), accounting and financials, confidential clients projects and other files, lots of NDA, credit card information, etc.
